## What & why

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (provider / grader / capability)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test` all pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (and `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing)
- [ ] No secrets or large binaries committed
